## Type

- [ ] Bug
- [ ] Feature request
- [ ] Refactor

- [ ] Research/experiment proposal

## Summary

Describe the issue or proposal in 1-3 sentences.

## Current behavior

What happens now? Include exact error messages when relevant.

## Expected behavior

What should happen instead?
